_mode_comment: paper = simulated fills in local ledger. live = route orders to the configured broker (see broker section). DEMO REHEARSAL since 2026-07-12: live routing into the Trading 212 PRACTICE account (fake money) — t212_environment MUST stay 'demo' until the real go-live decision.

broker.name: trading212
broker._quantity_decimals_note: T212 rejects fractional order quantities with too many decimals (quantity-precision-mismatch). 4dp failed, 2dp is safe across instruments. Order quantities are rounded to this precision before sending.
broker._currency_note: The T212 account is denominated in GBP (£100 practice). API cash/P-L figures are GBP; per-share US stock prices are USD. Ledger bookkeeping stays USD, converted via bot/fx.py; broker cash is adopted into the ledger (cash_sync) when drifted >2%.
broker._guardrails: t212_environment demo|live. live_orders_enabled MUST be true to send real orders (default false = dry-run, logs intended orders only). Trading 212's API cannot access cards/deposits/withdrawals. Fractional shares supported when top-level fractional_shares is true. Every order checked against max_order_value_usd. Set t212_api_key in data/secrets.json or the T212_API_KEY secret.

_deposit_note: 0 during the T212 demo rehearsal — the practice account gets no real deposits, so auto-crediting the ledger would drift it away from the broker. Restore (~127) at real go-live.
_backtest_capital_note: Seed balance for backtest/sweep/walk-forward simulations (≈ the £100 practice account in USD). Decoupled from monthly_deposit_usd (which is 0 in the rehearsal, and would otherwise leave the sim with no buying power). Raise this alongside max_position_usd at real go-live so the sim reflects the funded account.

buying._sizing_note: DEMO-REHEARSAL POSTURE (2026-07-12): buys 3/day 6/wk and min_score 5.25 to get real fills through the T212 pipeline this week. BEFORE REAL MONEY restore the learnings-backed posture: 2/day 4/wk, min_score 5.5 (tune showed higher frequency worse). max_position_usd 25 sized for the $100 demo account.
buying._conviction_note: CONVICTION OVERRIDE (2026-07-13): candidates scoring >= high_conviction_score (8.0 — well above the 5.25 gate, needs several corroborating signals) get the higher HC daily/weekly caps instead of the routine ones. Rationale: only trade MORE when the evidence is genuinely strong. UNTESTED vs the blanket-frequency finding — the nightly deep run should validate it; treat as a rehearsal experiment. Hard vetoes + confluence gate still protect every entry regardless of tier.
buying._resize_note: 2026-07-14: T212 demo reset to £500 (~$670). Position cap 25->100 (~15% of book max), sim seed 134->670. Risk %s unchanged — they scale with equity naturally.

_user_watchlist_note: Manual watchlist DISABLED — the bot trades purely on API-driven signals + scoring + confluence. No hand-picked tickers.

wildcard._note: Ring-fenced speculative sleeve: sub-$1 r/pennystocks names in the 20-80c band, tiny whole-share bets. STILL must pass the dilution + spread vetoes and a research/intel quality gate (require_research_ok). Wider stop/take-profit than the core (penny stocks swing hard). Separate budget from the core book. Lottery-ticket money by design — keep max_position_usd small.

earnings._note: Earnings within avoid_earnings_days (2) = hard veto (too close to hold through). Earnings 3-15 days out + positive momentum/news = catalyst bonus. Positions are force-sold 1 day before earnings to avoid the binary event.

risk._hc_note: High-conviction sizing: candidates scoring >= buying.high_conviction_score risk 1.5% of equity instead of 0.75% — strong evidence earns roughly double the allocation. max_position_usd still caps every trade.
risk._sector_note: 0 = sector cap DISABLED (2026-07-14, user call: trust the data). Set back to 2 to restore diversification cap. Stops/drawdown-halt/risk-officer remain the guards.

learning._auto_tuning_note: auto_apply_tuning: overnight job auto-applies the best ROBUST stop/take-profit region from the tune sweep, clamped to safe bounds (stop 8-15%, TP 15-40%). Never touches hard vetoes or position caps.
learning._pause_note: Paused 2026-07-14: tune ranks on the 6mo window only; it flip-flops exits against full-year evidence. Re-enable once learn.py ranks across BOTH windows.

_fractional_note: Trading 212's API supports fractional (decimal) share quantities. true = size positions to exact dollar amounts (4dp); false = whole shares only. With fractional on, max_position_usd is deployed precisely and expensive names are reachable.
_realistic_fills_note: Paper + backtest fills pay the real bid/ask spread (buy at ask, sell at bid) — Alpaca quote when available, else estimated by price tier (<$1=4%, <$5=2%, else 0.8% round-trip). Makes paper results predict LIVE reality. Set false only to compare against optimistic last-price fills.
_force_regime_note: Overrides the research/quant regime blend. 'risk_on' = full-auto aggressive (lowest buy threshold, widest stops). Set null to restore the adaptive conservative blend. Hard vetoes always apply regardless.

selling._note: WINDOW-CONFLICT HOLD (2026-07-14): 6mo/8wk sweeps favour stop8/TP15 (+4.9% OOS) but the full 12mo sim shows -11.5% with them vs +23.5% at 15/25. Set to the overlap-robust middle (12/25, both windows agree the region is profitable) and auto-tune PAUSED until the study adjudicates which window reflects the live regime.

critic._note: Pre-buy critic: local Claude CLI reviews each buy before execution (subscription auth from the vault). FAIL-OPEN: if Claude is unreachable the buy proceeds — advisory layer, hard vetoes already ran. Vetoes logged as critic_veto.
